error_signature: only one trigger node can be registered in published mode
title: Multiple Postgres Trigger nodes not firing in published mode
symptom: When using multiple Postgres Trigger nodes in a published workflow, only one node fires, while others do not execute at all.
not_this_if: Only one trigger node is used
root_cause: In n8n's published mode, only one trigger node can be registered for a workflow. This means that when multiple trigger nodes are present, only the first one is activated, causing the others to silently fail to fire.
fix_steps: Split each Postgres Trigger node into its own separate workflow
Alternatively, use a single trigger node and implement branching logic after it
agent_instruction: Separate each Postgres Trigger into its own workflow or use one trigger with branching logic.
